text: Running a school takes work. But tracking the money? That's even harder. Cash. Paper. Books. Spreadsheets. It's week eight of term one... and nobody's quite sure who paid, or who still owes. Thirteen thousand outstanding. We think. Month-end? It'll be ready next week. There has to be a better way. Meet SchoolPurse. The finance dashboard, built for Zimbabwean schools. Cash comes in. The bursar logs it, the receipt prints, the ledger updates. In seconds. Every outstanding balance, by student, by class, by term. Spot who to chase today. Not at month-end. Every payment becomes a printable receipt. School header, line items, signature line. Automatic. Built in Harare, for Zimbabwean schools. SchoolPurse. School-purse dot app.
